nl_query: List all evaluators for the evaluation board for course id MBA01 alondg with their workloads
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.employee_id, fc.name, COUNT(DISTINCT ea.id) AS workload
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   exam_student_mapping esm ON esm.student_id = sa.student_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = esm.course_id
WHERE  au.id = 'MBA01'
  AND  ea.status = 'IN_PROGRESS'
  AND  ea.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY fc.employee_id, fc.name
ORDER  BY workload DESC;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: column sa.student_id does not exist
LINE 1: ...JOIN exam_student_mapping esm ON esm.student_id = sa.student...
                                                             ^
HINT:  Perhaps you meant to reference the column "esm.student_id".
